objective: [Momentum] sur 0GUSDC en 1h. Indicateurs : EMA + OBV + STOCHASTIC. Entrées : Bollinger Lower Band, EMA(3), Bollinger Middle Band; Sorties : Aroon Up (+5%), macd_signal line > signal line. Risk management : SL at -2% and TP at 1%. Hypothese testable: "La combinaison des signaux de AROON et MACD avec les indicateurs EMA et STOCHASTIC peut repérer des moments d'entrée sur le marché crypto en cours d'action.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining Bollinger bands and ATR with RSI and STOCHASTIC indicators can detect trading opportunities in the crypto market.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] I have reviewed the momentum strategy and identified potential weaknesses, such as overfitting due to increased indicators. If results are poor, I would consider reducing the number of indicators or adjusting parameters for better performance. For mediocre returns, I could explore parameter adjustments to improve Sharpe ratio. In case of failure, I may consider alternative approaches like mean reversion strategies or sentiment analysis.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy attempts to capture momentum by combining EMA, OBV, STOCHASTIC indicators with ATR based risk management. The entry conditions are defined using RSI and ADX and the exit condition is when price crosses Bollinger middle band or ADX < 20. However, it may be sensitive to market noise as all signals rely on close prices which can be affected by large moves in either direction. If results turn out poor (negative return), changing the entry conditions to use open prices instead of close prices might help reduce false positives and improve performance.

Backup plan: Change from using Bollinger bands, EMA(3) or Stochastic to a more robust volatility measure like ATR would increase robustness. Additionally, excluding periods with high market noise (ADX > 25) could be considered.

iterations.hypothesis: Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy is based on momentum indicators EMA, STOCHASTIC along with Aroon Up and MACD. The risk management has been set up at 2% SL and 1% TP. Hypothesis testing is used to filter the entries. If results are poor, a fallback contract will be generated automatically to maintain progress. If mediocre returns are observed, adjustments may include tweaking parameters like adjusting the period of EMA or increasing the lookback window for Aroon Up.
[Backup plan] In case of failure, alternative approaches can be tried such as: 1) Adding more momentum indicators to increase accuracy and robustness, 2) Using other types of sentiment analysis based on social media data or news feeds etc. ,3) Incorporating fundamental factors into the strategy like examining company's earnings reports.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy is based on momentum indicators EMA, STOCHASTIC along with Aroon Up and MACD. The risk management has been set up at 2% SL and 1% TP. Hypothesis testing is used to filter the entries. If results are poor, a fallback contract will be generated automatically to maintain progress. If mediocre returns are observed, adjustments may include tweaking parameters like adjusting the period of EMA or increasing the lookback window for Aroon Up.
[Backup plan] In case of failure, alternative approaches can be tried such as: 1) Adding more momentum indicators to increase accuracy and robustness, 2) Using other types of sentiment analysis based on social media data or news feeds etc. ,3) Incorporating fundamental factors into the strategy like examining company's earnings reports.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy attempts to capture momentum by combining EMA, OBV, STOCHASTIC indicators with ATR based risk management. The entry conditions are defined using RSI and ADX and the exit condition is when price crosses Bollinger middle band or ADX < 20. However, it may be sensitive to market noise as all signals rely on close prices which can be affected by large moves in either direction. If results turn out poor (negative return), changing the entry conditions to use open prices instead of close prices might help reduce false positives and improve performance.

Backup plan: Change from using Bollinger bands, EMA(3) or Stochastic to a more robust volatility measure like ATR would increase robustness. Additionally, excluding periods with high market noise (ADX > 25) could be considered.
